first_2_records.paper_title: Cancer Risk Assessment from Trihalomethanes in Community Water Supply at Northeastern Thailand
first_2_records.journal: International Journal of Environmental Science and Development

rows.benchmark_paper: Global assessment of chemical quality of drinking water: The case of trihalomethanes
rows.full_title: Cancer Risk Assessment from Trihalomethanes in Community Water Supply at Northeastern Thailand
rows.sample_notes: 来源仅为网页摘要文本；文中表述为“highest levels”，可理解为17个社区水厂中该厂总THMs最高值，但未明确标注为max/mean等统计口径；采样时间、样本量、分析方法在该摘录中均未给出。
rows.original_excerpt: "the Chongsammoe water treatment plant in Chaiyaphum province was found in the highest levels of 48.46 μg/L for total THMs"

first_2_records.notes: 仅提供了IJESD网页HTML的摘要片段，未包含全文或补充材料表格；因此只能提取到摘要中明确给出的1条总THMs浓度数据（地点=Chongsammoe水厂，Chaiyaphum省）。
